column1: === SWARA — Facial Expression Coder ===
Primary role: FACIAL EXPRESSION (all 50 videos)
Secondary role: STANCE on Kelly's daily batch (for IRR — your codes tested against Kelly's)
Your assigned videos for SEGMENTATION: V02 V03 V07 V08 V09 V10 V11 V12
[SEG] = segment boundaries already identified (but NOT split into TCUs yet — still your job to split)
STEP-BY-STEP FOR YOUR ASSIGNED VIDEOS:
1. Open each video at the ai_mention_timestamp
2. Scroll backward in transcript to find segment_start (true topic opening)
3. Scroll forward to find segment_end (topic closing / chair moving on)
4. Read transcript between boundaries → identify TCU breaks (new idea = new TCU)
5. For each TCU: fill tcu_id, tcu_transcript, tcu_start, tcu_end
6. IMMEDIATELY watch muted video for that TCU → fill facial_expression
7. DELETE the original keyword-hit rows for that video once all TCUs are added
8. Post your updated file to the shared folder by end of day
FOR OTHER VIDEOS (not your assigned ones):
Wait for the assigned student to post their TCU rows.
Then open their file and fill in facial_expression for each of their TCUs.
SECONDARY ROLE — STANCE (daily):
Each day Kelly reports completed TCUs → you code stance on the same TCUs.
For stance: read tcu_transcript ONLY. No audio. No video.
Fill your stance codes in the stance column of Kelly's file.
FACIAL EXPRESSION REMINDER: Watch muted video. Code the expression
dominant across the full TCU clip (not a single frame). Minimum 2 seconds.
